title: Lollipop Chart via a Custom Series Type (Marks)

files.name: chart.js
index.html
files.code: A lollipop is a scalar-y custom series: renderItem draws a stem from scales.y(0) up to the value and caps it with a circle. Marks carry their datum identity, so hover, the shared tooltip and legend toggle work without any extra wiring.

files.name: styles.css
